source_jobs.title: General Application
source_jobs.description:
Isometric is the AI-native certifier of climate solutions.

We combine scientific rigor with best-in-class technology to unlock the capital and trust needed to reverse climate change.

Our customers https://registry.isometric.com/?tab=deliveries, including Microsoft and Google, trust us to help them avoid greenwashing.

We’re looking for doers with a bias to action. Our team https://isometric.com/about-us#meet-team is brilliant and cares (a lot).

Join us for the most impactful role of your career—and the best job you’ve ever had.



[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/62be68a6-1b47-4914-84d1-975d0a96ff2b/72fd43ce-8d72-4da6-b9a3-70211217154b/DSC05145.jpg]




A ROLE AT ISOMETRIC ISN’T FOR YOU IF:

 - You want a remote job. We value collaboration and physical time together. We’re in the office three days per week.

 - You want to stay within your area of expertise and you prefer structured environments. We’re a small team moving at extreme pace in an environment with plenty of ambiguity. We’re building and learning on the fly—and everyone’s a generalist.

 - You’re looking for a short term gig. Everything at Isometric is designed for the long term: our business model, our reward system and our decision-making processes. You should only apply if you’re looking to make a move that will last 5-10 years.



[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/62be68a6-1b47-4914-84d1-975d0a96ff2b/72e2f781-3fa7-45ca-a202-78593c47aee5/a-3K6A5340-68.jpg]

source_jobs.title: Finance
source_jobs.description:
Isometric is the AI-native certifier of climate solutions.

We combine scientific rigor with best-in-class technology to unlock the capital and trust needed to reverse climate change.

Our customers https://registry.isometric.com/?tab=deliveries, including Microsoft and Google, trust us to help them avoid greenwashing.

We’re looking for doers with a bias to action. Our team https://isometric.com/about-us#meet-team is brilliant and cares (a lot).

Join us for the most impactful role of your career—and the best job you’ve ever had.




THINGS YOU'LL DO IN THIS ROLE:

 - Own day-to-day finance (month-end close, AP/AR, bank reconciliations, payroll coordination) and revenue (invoicing, billing, collections, revenue recognition) operations.

 - Develop and maintain the company's financial models, forecasts and board-level reporting pack, partnering with the Chief of Staff and leadership team on runway planning, pricing analysis and fundraising preparation.

 - Be the first dedicated finance hire: own the relationship with external accountants, auditors and tax advisors, strengthen existing controls and workflows, and make sure our finance processes keep pace as the company scales.




THINGS WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

 - Qualified accountant (ACA, ACCA, CIMA or equivalent) with hands-on experience running finance in a high-growth startup or scale-up—you've improved and scaled processes, not just inherited them.

 - Comfortable across the full stack: you can close the books on Monday, build a three-statement model on Tuesday and chase down a late invoice on Wednesday. Strong modelling skills and the ability to present complex analysis simply to a non-finance audience.

 - Bias to action and comfort with ambiguity.




THIS ROLE ISN'T FOR YOU IF:

 - You want a remote job. We value in-person collaboration and spend three days a week in the office.

 - You prefer staying within your area of expertise and operating in structured environments. We navigate ambiguity at extreme pace and everyone is a generalist.

 - You're looking for a short term gig. We're building for the long term and looking for people ready to grow with us for 5-10 years.



[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/62be68a6-1b47-4914-84d1-975d0a96ff2b/296c2e9b-3c09-4fd9-b801-5fce17f07496/DSC04175.jpg]

source_jobs.title: Product Manager (New Markets)
source_jobs.description:
Isometric is the AI-native certifier of climate solutions.

We combine scientific rigor with best-in-class technology to unlock the capital and trust needed to reverse climate change.

Our customers https://registry.isometric.com/?tab=deliveries, including Microsoft and Google, trust us to help them avoid greenwashing.

We’re looking for doers with a bias to action. Our team https://isometric.com/about-us#meet-team is brilliant and cares (a lot).

Join us for the most impactful role of your career—and the best job you’ve ever had.




WHAT IS THE JOB?

 1. Launch 0→1 in new domains. Lead discovery, early business development, prototyping and launch of products in new areas – expanding Isometric’s AI certification to new environmental products such as green cement and beyond.

 2. Build it yourself. Use AI to vibe-code working demos and clickable prototypes you can put in front of real customers. The bar isn't production-grade code, it's taking an idea to a tangible prototype without waiting for engineering, then iterating on it with real users.

 3. Find what's valuable. Ship it. Pair with the commercial team to prototype with and sell to design partners, validate willingness-to-pay, and productionise the winners. Help build out Certify – our AI-certification platform – and the foundation we're building everything new on top of.
    
    


THINGS WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

 - Proven track record. 3+ years in product management or an adjacent product development role, with a history of shipping products people actually use.

 - High agency. You can independently figure out a new area and drive it forward despite high ambiguity. Strong bias to action: you default to shipping, deciding and moving rather than waiting for clarity.

 - AI-native. You ship working products, not just specs. Comfortable using AI to build demos and prototypes yourself, and you bring strong taste and craft to everything you make, from a 1-day demo to a productionised v1.

 - Commercial instinct, customer-led. You can spot where to play, frame a sharp value prop, and be a compelling partner to the commercial team in selling to first customers. You're obsessive about deep discovery — you talk to lots of users, validate real demand before scaling investment, and let customer signal, not internal opinion, drive what to build next.
   
   


THIS ROLE ISN'T FOR YOU IF:

 - You want a remote job. We value in-person collaboration and spend Monday, Wednesday and Friday in the office.

 - You prefer staying within your area of expertise and operating in structured environments. We navigate ambiguity at extreme pace and everyone is a generalist.

 - You're looking for a short term gig. We're building for the long term and looking for people ready to grow with us for 5–10 years.

source_jobs.title: Partnerships Manager
source_jobs.description:
Isometric is the AI-native certifier of climate solutions.

We combine scientific rigor with best-in-class technology to unlock the capital and trust needed to reverse climate change.

Our customers https://registry.isometric.com/?tab=deliveries, including Microsoft and Google, trust us to help them avoid greenwashing.

We’re looking for doers with a bias to action. Our team https://isometric.com/about-us#meet-team is brilliant and cares (a lot).

Join us for the most impactful role of your career—and the best job you’ve ever had.



[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/62be68a6-1b47-4914-84d1-975d0a96ff2b/cdf75003-81aa-4845-9391-29e5889c8fb7/photo%20for%20job%20description%20(new).jpg]




THINGS YOU’LL DO IN THIS ROLE:

 - Lead on winning a wide range of project developers

 - Support other team members on winning top priority project developers

 - Own team-wide processes, such as triaging inbound leads and supplier onboarding. You will be responsible for running these effectively as well as improving how they work over time (leveraging AI tools).

 - Isometric champion — represent Isometric at events and in front of key partners across different platforms and geographies

 


THINGS WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

 - Strong motivation to work on climate and carbon removal, with a willingness to dive into complex topics

 - Comfortable working in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and proactive about getting things done

 - Highly proficient with AI tools like Claude Code or Claude Cowork

 - Clear and confident communicator — able to break down technical concepts to non-expert audiences

 - Desirable: Prior experience in startups and/or technical sectors (e.g. finance, law, software)

 - Desirable: STEM background

 


THIS ROLE ISN’T FOR YOU IF:

 - You want a remote job. We value in-person collaboration and spend three days a week in the office.

 - You prefer staying within your area of expertise and operating in structured environments. We navigate ambiguity at extreme pace and everyone is a generalist.

 - You’re looking for a short term gig. We’re building for the long term and looking for people ready to grow with us for 5-10 years.



[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/62be68a6-1b47-4914-84d1-975d0a96ff2b/a11e02ef-d5bf-4458-9470-c306147c5f3a/Photo%20for%20job%20description%202.jpg]

source_jobs.title: Data Centre Consultant
source_jobs.description:
Isometric is the AI-native certifier of climate solutions.

We combine scientific rigor with best-in-class technology to unlock the capital and trust needed to reverse climate change.

Our customers https://registry.isometric.com/?tab=deliveries, including Microsoft and Google, trust us to help them avoid greenwashing.

We’re looking for doers with a bias to action. Our team https://isometric.com/about-us#meet-team is brilliant and cares (a lot).

Join us for the most impactful role of your career—and the best job you’ve ever had.




WHAT IS THE JOB?

 1. Bring data centre expertise to a fast-moving new domain. Help us go 0→1 on data centre sustainability. You'll be our in-house authority on how data centres actually consume energy, manage cooling, and account for their carbon—and you'll bring the rigour and defensibility Isometric is known for.

 2. Run deep discovery with operators, buyers and the market. Get out and talk to hyperscalers, colocation providers, energy teams and corporate buyers. Map where today's reporting and certification falls short, where the real measurement problems live, and where a trustworthy registry can change the game.

 3. Pressure-test what good looks like. Work with our science, product and commercial teams to explore how data centre sustainability could be measured and verified more rigorously. Stress-test ideas against real facilities and data, and learn fast from operators and buyers.

 4. Help us win the first customers. Work alongside the commercial team to frame the value prop, get in front of operators and buyers, and translate technical rigour into reports and assessments that decision-makers trust and pay for. You're as comfortable producing the work as you are selling why it matters.




THINGS WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Deep data centre fluency. You understand how data centres work at a technical level (power draw, cooling, PUE/WUE, grid interconnection and energy procurement) ideally from time spent operating, designing, advising or auditing facilities.

 - Carbon and energy accounting rigour. You're fluent in GHG accounting (Scope 1/2/3), embodied vs. operational emissions, and the hard parts: market vs. location-based methods, 24/7 carbon-free energy matching, and where the numbers get gamed.

 - A track record of real delivery. You've produced work the industry takes seriously. You helped data centers secure permits & certifications, pass audits, and write sustainability reports—or you've consulted closely enough to do so.

 - High agency, commercially minded. You can independently figure out a new area and drive it forward under high ambiguity, with a strong bias to action. You're obsessive about discovery and you're a compelling partner to the commercial team in framing the offer and winning over first customers.

notes: AI-native certifier of climate solutions with a focus on product development
